tools.name: Elicit
tools.description: AI research assistant that finds and summarizes academic papers.
tools.swUseCase: Students search for evidence-based interventions for specific populations.

tools.name: Consensus
tools.description: AI-powered search engine for peer-reviewed research.
tools.swUseCase: Faculty find current research on social work practice outcomes.

tools.name: Research Rabbit
tools.description: Citation-based discovery tool that maps related papers.
tools.swUseCase: Build literature networks around topics like housing insecurity or racial disparities in child welfare.

tools.name: Gradescope
tools.swUseCase: Streamline grading of reflective journals and case analyses across large sections.

tools.name: Turnitin Draft Coach
tools.description: Writing feedback tool integrated with LMS.
tools.swUseCase: Students get real-time feedback on APA formatting and citation quality before submission.

tools.name: Quizizz AI
tools.swUseCase: Auto-generate comprehension checks from CSWE competency readings.

tools.name: Grammarly
tools.description: AI writing assistant for grammar, tone, and clarity.
tools.swUseCase: Help students refine professional emails to field supervisors and agencies.

tools.name: Diffit
tools.description: Generates adapted reading materials at different levels.
tools.swUseCase: Create differentiated case study materials for students with varied reading levels.

tools.name: Brisk Teaching
tools.description: AI teaching assistant for feedback and lesson planning.
tools.swUseCase: Generate rubric-aligned feedback on student process recordings.

tools.name: Turnitin AI Detection
tools.description: AI writing detection integrated with LMS.
tools.swUseCase: Flag potential AI-generated content in student papers for conversation, not punishment.

tools.name: Copyleaks
tools.description: AI and plagiarism detection with multilingual support.
tools.swUseCase: Screen student submissions with nuanced reports that distinguish AI-assisted from AI-generated work.

tools.name: GPTZero
tools.description: AI detection tool designed for educators.
tools.swUseCase: Quick-check student writing with probability scores and highlighted passages.

tools.name: Claude
tools.description: Anthropic’s AI assistant — strong at analysis and nuanced reasoning.
tools.swUseCase: Upload an entire case study and ask Claude to identify risk factors.

tools.name: ChatGPT
tools.description: OpenAI’s conversational AI — versatile and widely adopted.
tools.swUseCase: Create a Custom GPT as a "client" for role-play practice.

tools.name: Google Gemini
tools.description: Google’s AI with deep integration into Workspace.

tools.name: Google NotebookLM
tools.description: AI-powered notebook that grounds responses in your sources.
tools.swUseCase: Upload your syllabus, course readings, and CSWE competencies.

tools.name: Perplexity AI
tools.description: AI-powered answer engine with cited sources.
tools.swUseCase: Students use for evidence-based practice research.

warning: ⚠️ No AI detection tool is 100% accurate. Use as a conversation starter, not definitive proof.
